name: Snack Cart Pyromancer
text:
When Snack Cart Pyromancer enters the battlefield, create two Snack tokens. (A Snack is an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 1 life and feel a little better. Then draw a card if you control a Goblin.")
{R}, Sacrifice a Snack: Snack Cart Pyromancer deals 2 damage to any target.
flavorText: Hot pretzels, cold sodas, and exactly one fireball per customer.
